RiskLevel.description:
Risk classification assigned to each tool, ordered by severity.

All four comparison operators are defined explicitly and compare :attr:`rank`.
This is not optional decoration: ``StrEnum`` inherits ``str``'s comparisons, so
omitting any one of them silently falls back to *alphabetical* ordering --
``"read" >= "execute"`` is True because 'r' sorts after 'e'. That would make
``risk >= RiskLevel.EXECUTE`` accept a read, and every severity gate in the
permissions engine would compare spelling instead of severity.
RiskLevel.title: RiskLevel

description: Schema version 1. A single permission rule. Evaluation order is documented in docs/permissions-engine.md.

tools.description: Tool names or fnmatch globs. Empty = any tool.
tools.title: Tools

command_patterns.description: fnmatch globs matched against the full command line.
command_patterns.title: Command Patterns

max_risk.description: Rule applies only at or below this risk level.

allow_sensitive.description: Required for an allow rule to cover credential-bearing paths.
allow_sensitive.title: Allow Sensitive

title: PermissionRuleModel
